mapper.select: SELECT * FROM items WHERE id = #{id} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE items SET stock = #{stock}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (member_id, store_id, order_status, total_price, pickup_code, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{storeId}, #{orderStatus}, #{totalPrice}, #{pickupCode}, NOW(), NOW())

INSERT INTO order_items (order_id, item_id, quantity, order_price, created_at) VALUES
(#{item.orderId}, #{item.itemId}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.orderPrice}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET order_status = #{orderStatus}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT o.id AS order_id, s.name AS store_name, o.created_at, o.total_price, oi.item_id, i.name AS item_name, oi.quantity, oi.order_price, i.thumbnail_url, CASE WHEN r.id IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS reviewed FROM orders o JOIN stores s ON s.id = o.store_id JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id JOIN items i ON i.id = oi.item_id LEFT JOIN reviews r ON r.order_id = o.id WHERE o.member_id = #{memberId} AND o.store_id = #{storeId} AND o.order_status = 'PAYMENT_COMPLETED' ORDER BY o.created_at DESC
